title: Dataflow FIFO sizing and deadlock guard
route: Use for hls::stream, DATAFLOW, FIFO depth warnings, stalls, or deadlock/cosim issues.
summary: For dataflow designs, FIFO depth trades memory for stall/deadlock avoidance; size streams according to producer-consumer imbalance and data-dependent control.
anti_patterns: do not add DATAFLOW before correctness
do not oversize every FIFO blindly
risk: Incorrect stream protocol changes can break functional behavior.
